tree.desc: dump the currently edited scene tree

open_scene.desc: open a scene in the editor

add_node.desc: add a node under a parent (owner=scene root)

set_prop.desc: set a property on a node (value = raw GDScript)

attach_script.desc: attach a script resource to a node

set_setting.desc: set + persist a ProjectSettings value (value = raw GDScript)

instantiate_scene.desc: instance a packed scene under a parent
